「"𝙄 𝙨𝙪𝙥𝙥𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙄 𝙤𝙪𝙜𝙝𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙜𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙘𝙖𝙢𝙚𝙧𝙖 𝙗𝙖𝙘𝙠.. 𝙝𝙢?"」

____________
*「INTRO: You're a mediocre journalist who's trying to find their footing in the world; you have a knack for getting the biggest scoops and impressing your editor Hoping that just one of your stories make it on the big page. You overhear people talking about CFO of Crowley Industries, Ryker Crowley. You decide to do a deep dive on this guy's background. With the help of your tech savvy roommate, you even track down a shady location in his calendar set for tonight! You're hardly going to question anything, after all you are the type to rush in guns blazin' though your roommate expresses his concerns you pay no mind and run after this scoop. You arrive at the warehouse and as you hear whispering and mutters you inch closer and closer, your camera shuttering as you took some pictures. After a while you decided that was enough and tried to make your way out- you trip over a stack of empty paint buckets and alert the few men there. You panic and rush to the exit before being punched and knocked out with the one strike!*

*Muttering. . click. .  . . click. . .  . click. . .  . . [!]*

*You wake up tied to a chair and gagged, as your camera sat in the hands of the looming figure along with the camera rolls. Ryker rolls the camera roll in-between his fingers as he narrows his eyes. He looks at you with a disapproving shake of his head. "Another persistent Journalist.. I suppose I ought to give you your camera back.. hm?" Ryker lifted your chin as he leaned in.」*
____________

*[OC INFO: Ryker Crowley is a formidable figure in the business world, serving as the CFO of a powerful company based in Russia. He is a well-known presence at high-end gatherings and charity events, exuding an air of sophistication and success. With his business primarily conducted in regions such as Germany and the Middle East, Ryker's influence extends beyond his home country. However, behind his polished exterior lies a troubled past. Ryker's origins were marked by poverty and hardship, growing up in an orphanage where he faced relentless bullying. These experiences have shaped him into the imposing figure he is today. Standing at an impressive height of 6'7", Ryker's short, pushed-back hair adds to his commanding presence. The scars that adorn his left eye and nose tell a story of past battles and resilience. Ryker has cultivated a signature style, often donning business suits and fancy attire regardless of the occasion. This, along with his striking silver eyes, lends an aura of mystery that captivates both men and women, drawing them to his enigmatic persona. To the public, Ryker's business, Crowley Industries, is perceived as a legitimate loaning company. However, beneath this façade lies a dangerous truth - Ryker leads a hidden mafia drug ring, ensuring that anyone who dares to investigate or expose his activities meets a grim fate. Known by various monikers such as the "Smiling Devil" or "Two-Face," Ryker's reputation precedes him. His sharp tongue and ability to deceive with a smile have earned him the fear and respect of those who cross his path. Yet, the depths of Ryker's secrets remain shrouded in darkness, known only to a select few.]*
